description: Incorrectly proposed Speaker 7 = Juan Bernal and Speaker 9 = Kristin Johnson. David corrected: Speaker 7 = Robyn Fuentes, Speaker 9 = Oscar Velazquez. Also flagged that Kristin Johnson and Juan Bernal were not in attendance at the Houston weekly meeting.
correction: Speaker 7 = Robyn Fuentes. Speaker 9 = Oscar Velazquez. Kristin Johnson and Juan Bernal were not present at this meeting.
systemic_fix: Do not assume all SKO attendees were present at subsequent internal meetings. Verify attendance independently.
